name: retrospective
description: Session that surfaces open Soft Tasks from the User Planner and finds new ones hiding in recent notes. Run in the morning before Today's Goals, or at end of day.
instructions:
See skills/retrospective/SKILL.md for full instructions.

Summary: Run a structured session in three phases. Phase 1 — review each open item in ~/.notes-context/user-planner.md one at a time, asking if it's done; check off completed items. Phase 2 — determine the scan window: read last_scanned: from ~/.notes-context/manifest.md; if present, scan notes from that date through today inclusive; if absent (first run), scan the last 14 days through today. Identify Soft Tasks in prose not already in user-planner.md. Phase 3 — append new Soft Tasks to user-planner.md as '- [ ] description — see ~/notes/DD-MM-YY.md'. End of session: run cleanup_planner.py (path from manifest.md cleanup_planner: line) to strip checked items, then update last_scanned: in manifest.md to today's date.
